text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap asked me to meet her behind the
school building after training for some reason. I
head there right away.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: There you are! I've been waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: There's something I want to give you. Here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hands me a transparent bag of carefully
wrapped chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I thought I might try and make some chocolate
since it's Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Creek taught me how, so they should be
tasty.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It took me a few tries to get it right, and by the
time I was done, it was already this late...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to properly express my gratitude for
everything you've done for me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've been given lots of chocolate since I came to
this academy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I never realized how nice it is to give chocolate to
someone else though.
choice_data_list: But why behind the school building?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Isn't this where you're supposed to give
people chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This is where everyone gave me chocolate when I
first got here—although people tend to just give
it to me wherever nowadays.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Oguri Cap's grand appetite has won her
many friends, she was initially someone people
admired from a distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now, she's someone everyone can express
their feelings to anytime and anywhere. You
could say she was destined for popularity.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All right, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
To the dorm pantry. That's where the leftover
chocolate is.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The results of all the experimental batches. I think
we melted about 20 kilos' worth of chocolate in
total.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yep. Way too much to carry to school. But rest
assured, it's all being kept cool!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Rejects or not, I'm proud of each one. I plan to
eat too, so let's enjoy them together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus concludes my Valentine's Day with
Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Whew.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Nothing... I actually kinda feel relieved.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My heart was racing while I was waiting for
you—and not like it does when I run.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering whether I should give you a lot
more...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But when I finished this batch, I realized this was it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I thought about you a lot while making it. All
those thoughts are packed into this one batch of
chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So... Thank you for accepting my gift.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy what little time I have left of Valentine's
Day together with the ever so slightly bashful
Oguri Cap.
